value.found_quote: `tools` | No | [Tools](#available-tools) the subagent can use. Inherits all tools if omitted.
value.rationale: The page describes the per-agent `tools` frontmatter field that restricts which tools a subagent can use, including a companion `disallowedTools` field. It also explicitly lists "Enforce constraints by limiting which tools a subagent can use." This substantiates the claim of tool restrictions via the per-agent `tools` frontmatter field.
